lesson.title: Employment Rights (BCEA & LRA)
lesson.explanation: Basic Conditions of Employment Act: maximum 45 hours/week (9hrs/day for 5-day week), overtime at 1.5× (max 10hrs/week), 21 consecutive days annual leave, 30 days sick leave per 3-year cycle, 4 months maternity leave. National minimum wage: R27.58/hour (2024). Labour Relations Act: protection against unfair dismissal (need valid reason + fair procedure), right to join a union, CCMA handles disputes (0861 22 22 62). Retrenchment: Section 189 requires consultation, LIFO principle, severance = 1 week per year of service.

misconceptions.misconception: You don't need formal training for Employment Rights (BCEA & LRA)
misconceptions.correction: Proper training and certification are required for safety and legal compliance in SA.
misconceptions.why_students_think_this: People see informal work and assume no qualifications are needed.
